params.skillId: The skill whose validation is disputed.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.upheld: True if the challenge is valid (original validation was bad).

submitValidation(bytes32,bool,uint256,ui.details: Caller must own a registered node. Mirrors SkillShadower.record_shadow().

params.resultIpfsCid: IPFS CID of the detailed validation report.
params.success: Whether the skill output matched reference.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

returns.count: Total validations submitted across all skills.

CONSENSUS_THRESHOLD_BPS().notice: Minimum success rate for consensus (67% = 6700 bps).

getValidationConsensus(bytes32).notice: Check if a skill has reached validation consensus.

resolveChallenge(uint256,bool).notice: Resolve a challenge. Only the assigned arbitrator can call.

setStakingContract(address).notice: Set the Staking contract address (for slash calls).

stakingContract().notice: Address authorized to execute slashing (set to Staking contract).

submitValidation(bytes32,bool,uint256,ui.notice: Submit a shadow validation result for a skill.

validationCount(bytes32).notice: Get validation count for a skill.

validatorSubmissionCount(address).notice: Count of validations submitted by a given validator address.
